form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 7 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Little Nimbus carrying 60kg at $8. The run before that 5th of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1250m, 3 len behind Ebisu with 60kg at $6. Well placed to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, bumped Alessia Asheville inwards.
Over raced in the early stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 7th of 9 at this track on March 30 over 1200m, 9 len behind Somebody Somewhere carrying 60kg at $11. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Vaal on November 20 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Al Greenga carrying 58kg at $11. Fitter and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Second run back. First-up after four months 7th of 9 at this track on March 30 over 1200m, 9 len behind Somebody Somewhere carrying 60kg at $11. Previously second-up 4th of 13 at Vaal on November 20 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Al Greenga carrying 58kg at $11. Fitter and worth including.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 49-day let-up. First-up after three months second last of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Alessia Asheville carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at this track on June 12 over 1500m, slow going 0.8 len behind Ocotillo carrying 60kg at $26. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Second run back. Comes off a 49-day let-up. First-up after three months second last of 9 at this track on February 25 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Alessia Asheville carrying 58.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at this track on June 12 over 1500m, slow going 0.8 len behind Ocotillo carrying 60kg at $26. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped inwards leaving the stalls and made contact with Beautiful One.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at this track December 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Wyze Declaration with 59kg at $126. On debut ran last of 12 at this track November 8 over 1200m, 21 len behind Gimmeanotherviking with 60kg at $67. Hasn't shown enough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resuming. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at this track December 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Wyze Declaration with 59kg at $126. On debut ran last of 12 at this track November 8 over 1200m, 21 len behind Gimmeanotherviking with 60kg at $67. Hasn't shown enough.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 5th of 12 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind April Fools' Day with 60kg at $3.30. Second run from a spell 6th of 9 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Lady Orbit carrying 61.5kg at $8. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 5th of 12 at this track on February 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind April Fools' Day with 60kg at $3.30. Second run from a spell 6th of 9 at Durbanville on March 21 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Lady Orbit carrying 61.5kg at $8. Definite winning chance. Keep safe.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in away from the crop in the concluding stages.
Proved difficult to settle in the early stages.
Hanging out in the latter stages.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 2nd of 7 at Durbanville on March 25 over 1400m, nose behind Little Nimbus with 60kg at $4.30. The race before that 3rd of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Vivo Per Lei carrying 60kg at $2.50. Overdue for a win and another bold run is expected.

form.formComment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Not seen since she finished last of 11 at this track February 4 over 1000m, 9 len behind Cantona carrying 57.5kg at $34. On debut second last of 12 at this track November 8 over 1200m, 11 len behind Gimmeanotherviking carrying 60kg at $101. Hard to enthuse.
